hero.title: AI that saves time, reduces costs, and helps your business grow.
hero.subtitle: We help established companies use artificial intelligence in practical ways - to simplify operations, improve customer experience, and increase results without disrupting your business.
hero.supporting_line: You don't need to understand AI. You only need to see the benefits.
hero.cta: Talk to us about your business

valueProposition.headline: More Than Just a Pretty Page. A Real Helper for Your Business.
valueProposition.subheadline:
We don't just build common websites 
 we create systems that handle customers for you and save you time.
valueProposition.body: It's not enough anymore to just 'have a presence online.' Your site must be clear, fast, and work perfectly on smartphones. We build modern solutions that every one of your customers will understand.

services.title: How We Help You Grow
services.subtitle: We’ll help you move from an old website to a modern solution that brings in new customers.

items.title: AI Audit
items.desc: Get a comprehensive audit of your digital presence. From basic checks to deep research and deep analysis.

items.title: Modern & Clear Website
items.desc: Your customers will immediately understand what you offer. Your site will be modern, clean, and look great on both computers and phones.

items.title: Automatic Helper
items.desc: We'll add a smart system to your site that answers your customers' questions 24/7. You'll never miss a potential order again.

team.title: Meet Our Team
team.subtitle: We are here to help you succeed in the digital world without the technical jargon.

audit.title: Clear pricing for clear business results
audit.subtitle: Choose the level of analysis that helps you see what works, what doesn’t, and where your business can improve.

professional.title: Professional Business Audit
features: In-depth website and online presence analysis
Customer journey and weak point review
Clear priorities — what to fix first and why
Practical recommendations you can act on

cta.title: Let Technology Work for You
cta.description: Don't let the competition outpace you. Get a no-obligation analysis of your old page and find out how to improve it.
cta.successMessage: Your message has been sent. We will be in touch shortly.

footer.tagline: Your partner for modern web solutions. We build websites that deliver results.
